SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRA MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS GODINEZ IS PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
